sourcesContent:
// theme.js
export const darkAITheme = {
  body: "#0a0e1a",
  text: "#e0e6f0",
  expTxtColor: "#c8d0e0",
  highlight: "#121830",
  dark: "#060810",
  secondaryText: "#8892a8",
  imageHighlight: "#00d4ff",
  compImgHighlight: "#1a1f35",
  jacketColor: "#7c3aed",
  headerColor: "#00d4ff55",
  splashBg: "#060810",
  accentGradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #00d4ff 0%, #7c3aed 100%)",
  cardBg: "rgba(18, 24, 48, 0.6)",
  cardBorder: "rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.15)",
  glowColor: "#00d4ff",
};

export const blueTheme = {
  body: "#EDF9FE",
  text: "#001C55",
  expTxtColor: "#000a12",
  highlight: "#A6E1FA",
  dark: "#00072D",
  secondaryText: "#7F8DAA",
  imageHighlight: "#0E6BA8",
  compImgHighlight: "#E6E6E6",
  jacketColor: "#0A2472",
  headerColor: "#0E6BA877",
  splashBg: "#001C55",
};

export const chosenTheme = darkAITheme;
